summary: Hydrated state shows the hinted canonical PR #51584 is already closed and not mergeable. The remaining live work is security-routed: Telegram sandbox-explain/elevated channel identity is tracked by #51245, and Discord allowFrom fallback is tracked by #53198. Validator repair also routes the security-sensitive closed PR refs #51286 and #51584 exactly. No GitHub mutations or fix PR are safe from this worker because the open live fix lanes are security-sensitive.
